Get Started

Inaccessible Asset Monitoring

Real-time condition monitoring for rotating machinery via electrical signature analysis

Request Demo

Why Samotics

🔌 Non-invasive

Monitor equipment without installing complex sensors. Our ESA technology reads electrical patterns.

⚡ Real-time Insights

Immediate alerts when conditions change. Know the health of your assets before failures occur.

💰 Cost-Effective

Reduce unplanned downtime and maintenance costs. Predict failures weeks or months in advance.

🌍 Scalable

Monitor from a single pump to an entire plant. Works across all equipment types and sizes.

🔐 Reliable

Battle-tested in industrial environments. Works with legacy and modern equipment alike.

📊 Actionable Data

Detailed diagnostics and trending. Integration with your existing maintenance systems.

Electrical Signature Probes (ESPs)

Non-invasive sensors that monitor equipment health through electrical signature analysis

📡

ESP-100

Compact single-phase monitoring for smaller equipment and pilot installations

Voltage Range 110–240V
Sampling Rate 96 kHz
Power Draw 2.5W
⚡

ESP-300

Industrial three-phase monitoring for mid-size motors and pumps across Europe

Voltage Range 380–480V 3ph
Sampling Rate 192 kHz
Power Draw 3.8W
🔋

ESP-500

Heavy-duty three-phase monitoring for large motors, compressors, and critical equipment

Voltage Range Up to 1000V 3ph
Sampling Rate 384 kHz
Power Draw 5.2W

Archimedes Screws

Specialized monitoring for screw-type pumps and compressors in water and wastewater applications

🌊

AS-Low-Head

Low-head applications with flow rates up to 500 m³/h in municipal water systems

Flow Range 100–500 m³/h
Head Range Up to 5m
Efficiency Band 78–85%
💧

AS-Mid-Head

Mid-range lift for wastewater treatment with flows up to 300 m³/h

Flow Range 50–300 m³/h
Head Range 5–12m
Efficiency Band 75–82%
⛰️

AS-High-Head

High-lift screw for challenging terrain and extreme weather in Nordic regions

Flow Range 20–150 m³/h
Head Range 12–20m
Efficiency Band 70–78%

More Assets We Monitor

Comprehensive coverage across industrial equipment categories

🔩

Centrifugal Pumps

Standard pumping equipment in process and transfer applications

+ Details
Typical Flow: 50–500 m³/h
Head: 10–100m
Application: Chemical, municipal, industrial
⚙️

Rotating Compressors

Air and gas compression equipment in manufacturing and utilities

+ Details
Displacement: 10–500 m³/min
Pressure: Up to 25 bar
Application: Pneumatic, process, HVAC
🔄

Gear Boxes & Drives

Speed reduction and torque multiplication in process machinery

+ Details
Gear Type: Spur, helical, worm
Speed Range: 100–3000 RPM
Application: Conveyors, mills, drives
💨

Blowers & Fans

Ventilation and pneumatic conveying in industrial environments

+ Details
Air Volume: 5,000–100,000 m³/h
Pressure Rise: Up to 10 kPa
Application: Ventilation, conveying, wastewater
🏭

Granular Conveyors

Material handling systems in process and bulk handling

+ Details
Capacity: 10–500 tonnes/h
Length: 10–100m
Material: Steel, grain, aggregates
🔨

Mixers & Agitators

Liquid and powder mixing equipment across chemical and food production

+ Details
Tank Volume: 100–10,000 L
Agitation Speed: 50–500 RPM
Application: Chemical, food, pharmaceutical

Ready to Monitor Your Assets?

Get started with Samotics today. Real-time insights, maximum uptime.
